MAP.COMMENT: Trim all the XLink input fields

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do field level validation. Check if mandatory input fields are null or blank

INVOKE.COMMENT: Translate state name to state code if necessary

MAP.COMMENT: Error code & Error Description to SOAP response

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Main Block. Used exclusively to trap the exceptions caused due to DB

MAP.COMMENT: !!!! now lets prepare the customer number for the "like" query

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get all the lessee records that match the customer number from ODS

MAP.COMMENT: error code & error description to the response document

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Take one lessee record at a time and send it for comparision with the Xlink customer data

MAP.COMMENT: Trim all the fields within the lessee record

INVOKE.COMMENT: Compare XLink data with Lessee data from ODS

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If matched then store the corresponding lesseeID in a lesseeID list

MAP.COMMENT: store the matching lesseeID in a tempLesseeID

INVOKE.COMMENT: Add the tempLesseeID to lesseeID list

SEQUENCE.NAME: false
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If not matched, then take the next lessee record
Return the lesseeID back to XLink

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get the size of lesseeID list

BRANCH.COMMENT: Check whether lesseeID list is populated or not

SEQUENCE.NAME: %sizeOfLesseeIDList% > 0
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If the lesseeID list is populated then map the first lesseeID to response document

MAP.COMMENT: only the 1st lesseeID as the sorting is already done in the SQL query according to the priority mentioned in the user story

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If the lesseeID list is empty or null, then map the nextSequenceValue to the response

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get Current date - End time of transaction

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

MAP.COMMENT: Set error code and error description in the soap response
